intro: Barosma betulina oil, also known as Buchu oil, is a plant-based essential oil derived from the leaves of the Barosma betulina plant, native to South Africa. This oil has been traditionally used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy for skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The oil's unique aroma is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress, while also providing a fresh and herbaceous scent.
